ApprovedUser.title: ApprovedUser
ApprovedUser.description: An authorized user email with roles

email.description: The lowercase email address of the approved user

role.description: Role of the user, e.g. editor

addedAt.description: ISO timestamp of when the user was added

addedBy.description: Email of the admin/user who approved this account

/approved_users/{email}.description: Collection of users authorized to access the dashboard
